---
  title: "Training Curriculum"
---
  
  # Curriculum Overview
  
  The Arbo-Watch training programme consists of five integrated modules.

| Module | Duration | Focus Area |
  |----------|-----------|------------|
  | I | 5 Days | Data Collection and Management |
  | II | 5 Days | R Programming |
  | III | 5 Days | Statistical Modelling |
  | IV | 5 Days | Mathematical Modelling |
  | V | 5 Days | Spatial Epidemiology |
  
  ## Training Philosophy
  
  The curriculum emphasizes:
  
  - Practical application
- Reproducible research
- Open science
- One Health approaches
- Decision support
